name: WorkFusion AI Workforce REST API
what_it_does: WorkFusion AI Workforce REST API for financial services, banking, and insurance organizations to deploy pre-built AI digital workers for KYC, AML, sanctions screening, customer onboarding, and financial crime compliance — combining RPA with AI/ML for automated compliance operations — enabling automated digital worker deployment, case management, exception handling, and compliance workflow automation through WorkFusion's AI-powered automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage digital worker deployment for pre-built AI worker configuration and deployment automation, handle case management for compliance case routing and decision automation, access document processing for KYC and AML document extraction automation, retrieve transaction monitoring for AML transaction alert management automation, manage customer onboarding for digital onboarding workflow automation, handle sanctions screening for OFAC, EU, and UN sanctions check automation, access exception management for out-of-band review routing automation, retrieve audit for compliance audit trail and regulatory reporting automation, manage model management for AI model performance monitoring automation, and integrate WorkFusion with core banking, KYC, and compliance systems for financial crime compliance automation.
use_cases: Automating KYC customer onboarding and document verification for financial compliance agents
Processing AML transaction monitoring alerts for financial crime operations automation agents
Running sanctions screening against global watchlists for compliance automation agents
Managing financial crime case workflow and disposition for fraud operations automation agents
not_for: General-purpose RPA without financial compliance focus (WorkFusion is specialized for financial crime; UiPath and Blue Prism serve broader RPA needs)
Non-financial industry automation (WorkFusion is deeply specialized in banking, insurance, and financial compliance use cases)
Consumer-facing applications (WorkFusion automates back-office compliance operations, not consumer products)
best_when: A bank, insurance company, or financial institution wanting AI agents to automate KYC, AML, and financial crime compliance operations through WorkFusion's pre-built AI digital workers specialized for financial services compliance.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL SERVICES SPECIALIZATION: WorkFusion is specialized for financial crime compliance; automated general-automation assumption creates feature_gap for use cases outside KYC/AML/compliance scope; automated must verify WorkFusion fits the specific automation domain. ENTERPRISE AGREEMENT REQUIRED: WorkFusion serves financial institutions; automated open-developer assumption creates enterprise_required; WorkFusion requires banking or insurance firm relationship; automated must have WorkFusion enterprise agreement. PRE-BUILT WORKERS HAVE FIXED SCOPE: WorkFusion's AI digital workers are pre-built for specific tasks (KYC, sanctions, AML); automated fully-customizable assumption creates capability_mismatch for use cases not matching pre-built worker capabilities; automated must select the appropriate pre-built digital worker. COMPLIANCE REVIEW IS HUMAN-IN-LOOP: WorkFusion routes exceptions to human compliance analysts; automated fully-automated assumption creates incomplete_decision for cases requiring human compliance judgment; automated must design for human-in-loop exception handling in compliance operations.

auth.notes: WorkFusion uses OAuth2 for AI Workforce REST API. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2011 by Max Yankelevich and Andrew Volkov. Investors: Georgian, Insight Partners, Salesforce Ventures. Products: WorkFusion AML Investigator, WorkFusion KYC Analyst, WorkFusion Sanctions Analyst, WorkFusion Transaction Monitoring AI Worker. 50+ global financial institutions. Banks: Deutsche Bank, Standard Chartered, OTP Bank. Competes with Blue Prism, NICE Actimize, and Fenergo for financial compliance automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public trial; production requires WorkFusion enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per digital worker and use case; enterprise custom pricing for financial institutions
pricing.notes: New York NY. Georgian, Insight Partners backed. 50+ global financial institutions. Financial crime compliance specialist.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; AI worker APIs throttled per enterprise deployment capacity

known_agent_gotchas: DIGITAL WORKERS ARE TASK-SPECIFIC: Each WorkFusion digital worker handles one compliance task type; automated universal-worker assumption creates wrong_worker_for_task for routing KYC cases to AML workers or vice versa; automated must route cases to the correct specialized digital worker

CASE STATUS IS MULTI-STAGE: Compliance cases move through intake → AI review → human review → decision → closure stages; automated two-state assumption creates incomplete_tracking for cases requiring tracking through multiple workflow stages; automated must track full case lifecycle

HUMAN ESCALATION IS MANDATORY: WorkFusion automatically escalates uncertain cases to human analysts; automated full-automation assumption creates compliance_gap for cases without human analyst capacity to handle escalations; automated must staff human reviewer capacity

WATCHLIST DATA MUST BE CURRENT: Sanctions screening requires current watchlist data (OFAC, EU, UN sanctions lists); automated static-watchlist assumption creates missed_sanctions for screening against outdated lists; automated must refresh watchlist data per regulatory requirements

MODEL CONFIDENCE AFFECTS ROUTING: WorkFusion AI confidence scores determine human escalation threshold; automated fixed-confidence assumption creates misconfigured_routing for confidence thresholds not calibrated to compliance risk appetite; automated must tune confidence thresholds for institution's risk policy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial compliance RPA. SOC2, GDPR, BSA/AML. OAuth2. US/EU. KYC, AML, and sanctions screening data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial compliance automation. SOC2, GDPR, BSA/AML. OAuth2. US/EU. KYC and AML compliance data.
